title: alectra sessiliflora var. senegalensis
intro: Alectra sessiliflora var. senegalensis, also known as bitter calabar bean or calabar bean, is a plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by attaching to the roots of host plants, particularly in the Leguminosae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Alectra sessiliflora var. senegalensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or powder for use in traditional medicine.
